library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description:
List of names with quantities of money. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (ca. 1100-1138). Contributors list or distribution list of wheat? Names include: Zayn b. Q[...]; Abū l-Ḥasan ʿAllān; Abū l-Faḍl b. al-Qamḥa; Abū l-Munā Ibn Qashqūsh (appears also in T-S Misc.20.225 (PGPID 23303)). 

NB: this document was moved and its precise shelfmark was unknown for some time. Oded Zinger identified this as fitting with Mark Cohen's transcription for "77.?" in 2025.
tags: communal, list, charity, wheat, poverty, recipients
description_he: רשימת שמות עם סכומי כסף, בכתב חלפון בן מנשה, כ-1100-1138, כנראה רשימת תורמים או חלוקת חיטה
